positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a stylized, cheerful mountain range silhouette meeting a large crescent moon and scattered constellations. The design should have a clean, elegant, and modern aesthetic, suitable for screen printing. Focus on high contrast, deep indigo and gold leaf accents against a cream background. Incorporate geometric elements like abstract stars and interconnected lines to enhance the cosmic feeling. Central composition, vector art style, perfect for apparel print.
